steps.title: Identify the goal
steps.content: The student wants to contrast the locations — meaning show where each specimen is housed and emphasize the difference.

steps.title: Apply the goal to choices
steps.content:
Choice B shows both specimen locations (Boston and Tokyo) with “while” highlighting the contrast.
  • A emphasizes similarity rather than contrast
  • C describes only one location
  • D ignores location
. That matches choice B — B is correct.
